---
title: "help_page_5"
author: "Edward"
date: "2025-03-04"
output: html_document
---

<div style="color:green; ">
Exporting Plots:
</div>

- Use the download button or camera icon on interactive plots to download as PNG
<!-- High-resolution TIFF files (600 DPI) are saved automatically -->


<div style="color:green; ">
Saving Your Work:
</div>

- Use your browser's bookmark feature to save the app URL
<!-- - Export tables to Excel for further analysis -->

---
